name: search
description: Search input with debounced search callback and clear button

meta.name: Search
meta.description: Search input with debounced search callback and clear button

props.name: onSearch
props.description: Called with the query, debounced, as the user types.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text shown when the field is empty.

props.name: disabled
props.description: When true, disables the control and removes it from the tab order.

props.name: clearLabel
props.description: Accessible label for the clear button.

props.name: id
props.description: Id applied to the root element (auto-generated when omitted).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

whenToUse: A query field that filters or searches content, with a built-in clear button and debounced onSearch
Free-text search where results update as the user types (debounced) or on Enter
whenNotToUse: General non-search text entry — use Input
Search that presents an inline list of suggestions/results to pick from — use Combobox
A bounded numeric value — use NumberInput

antiPatterns.why: Search provides type="search" semantics, a magnifier affordance, a clear button, and built-in debouncing so you avoid firing a query on every keystroke

related.name: Input
related.reason: Use for general text entry that is not a search query

related.name: Combobox
related.reason: Use when the query should surface a selectable list of suggestions

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a native <input type="search"> associated with a <label> (defaulting from the i18n catalog) so the field is announced as a searchbox; the clear control is a labeled <button> and moves focus back to the input after clearing.

content.notes: placeholder, label, and clearLabel default from the i18n catalog; keep placeholder a short noun phrase like "Search products"

flexibility.note: Field and control styling must resolve to the listed --cascivo-* tokens
debounceMs and the placeholder/label/clear copy are free to suit the context
